dict.string: Phantasm uses the camera so you can take a photo to attach to a message.
Phantasm shares your calendar events with the AI model only when you turn on the Calendar tool for a chat and the model asks for it. Access is read-only.
Phantasm shares your calendar events with the AI model only when you turn on the Calendar tool for a chat and the model asks for it. Access is read-only.
Phantasm shares your Apple Health data with the AI model only when you turn on the Health tool for a chat and the model asks for it. Access is read-only.
Phantasm shares your current location with the AI model only when you turn on the Location tool for a chat and the model asks for it.
Phantasm uses the microphone so you can dictate messages. Audio is transcribed on-device and never leaves your phone.
Phantasm saves generated images to your photo library when you choose to save them.
Phantasm uses speech recognition to transcribe your dictation. On supported devices this runs entirely on-device.
